headline: The Tariff-Proof Stocks Wall Street Is Quietly Piling Into Right Now
summary: While the S&P 500 has gone essentially nowhere year-to-date and the VIX has climbed nearly 30% in a single month, a handful of stocks are quietly doing the opposite. Tariff anxiety is real, consumer sentiment is sitting at 56.4 on the University of Michigan index (recessionary territory), and prediction markets are pricing a roughly 60% ...
